senses.gloss: to cut off a bit of, to pare off, to take the edge from, to concinnate by levigating
to cut off a bit of, to pare off, to take the edge from, to concinnate by levigating

examples.text: يَا أَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ آمَنُوا إِنَّمَا ٱلْخَمْرُ وَٱلْمَيْسِرُ وَٱلْأَنْصَابُ وَٱلْأَزْلَامُ رِجْسٌ مِنْ عَمَلِ ٱلشَّيْطَانِ فَٱجْتَنِبُوهُ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُفْلِحُونَ

senses.gloss: cloven hoof, or the projecting part behind it
